news.title:
Colgate-Palmolive appoints Christopher Boerner, CEO of Bristol Myers Squibb, to its board and announces its 62nd annual dividend increase.
Dividend raised to $0.53 per quarter; board refresh aligns with health-linked oral care and premium product strategies in emerging markets.
news.summary:
Colgate-Palmolive appoints Christopher Boerner, CEO of Bristol Myers Squibb, to its board and announces its 62nd annual dividend increase.
Dividend raised to $0.53 per quarter; board refresh aligns with health-linked oral care and premium product strategies in emerging markets.

news.title:
Colgate leads F&O losses, dropping over 6% amid strong volumes.
Sensex down 1,342 pts to 76,864; Nifty drops 395 pts to 23,867.
news.summary:
Colgate leads F&O losses, dropping over 6% amid strong volumes.
Sensex down 1,342 pts to 76,864; Nifty drops 395 pts to 23,867.

news.title:
Colgate-Palmolive shares dropped 7%, the largest fall in 9 months, underperforming Nifty 500.
The stock is down 45% from its all-time high; analysts' targets range from ₹1,800 to ₹2,740.
news.summary:
Colgate-Palmolive shares dropped 7%, the largest fall in 9 months, underperforming Nifty 500.
The stock is down 45% from its all-time high; analysts' targets range from ₹1,800 to ₹2,740.

news.title:
CLSA warns Asian Paints, HUL, and Godrej Consumer may need steep price hikes if crude stays high.
ITC, Nestlé India, and Colgate India may require smaller hikes; high crude costs could pressure margins.
news.summary:
CLSA warns Asian Paints, HUL, and Godrej Consumer may need steep price hikes if crude stays high.
ITC, Nestlé India, and Colgate India may require smaller hikes; high crude costs could pressure margins.

news.title:
Top FMCG advertisers like HUL, P&G, Marico, and Colgate reduced Q3 ad spends by 6%, 17%, 2%, and 8%, respectively.
Experts predict ad spend recovery by Holi, potentially boosting entertainment platform revenues.
news.summary:
Top FMCG advertisers like HUL, P&G, Marico, and Colgate reduced Q3 ad spends by 6%, 17%, 2%, and 8%, respectively.
Experts predict ad spend recovery by Holi, potentially boosting entertainment platform revenues.

news.title:
MNCs like Coca-Cola, PepsiCo, Unilever, and Mondelez reaffirm commitment to India's growth potential despite mixed December quarter results.
Firms plan investments in premium categories, tech-enabled supply chains, and market expansion to tap India's vast consumer market and recovery.
news.summary:
MNCs like Coca-Cola, PepsiCo, Unilever, and Mondelez reaffirm commitment to India's growth potential despite mixed December quarter results.
Firms plan investments in premium categories, tech-enabled supply chains, and market expansion to tap India's vast consumer market and recovery.

news.title:
Colgate-Palmolive reported a Q4 2025 net loss of $37M despite sales rising to $5,230M, citing increased focus on margin and brand investment.
Shares are potentially undervalued by 24%, with fair value estimates ranging from $87 to $124.69 amid execution risks and margin expansion goals.
news.summary:
Colgate-Palmolive reported a Q4 2025 net loss of $37M despite sales rising to $5,230M, citing increased focus on margin and brand investment.
Shares are potentially undervalued by 24%, with fair value estimates ranging from $87 to $124.69 amid execution risks and margin expansion goals.

news.title:
Deckers Outdoor shares rose as Hoka brand sales outpaced expectations.
Adidas saw sales growth, expanded buybacks; Colgate logged Q4 loss due to skin health charges.
news.summary:
Deckers Outdoor shares rose as Hoka brand sales outpaced expectations.
Adidas saw sales growth, expanded buybacks; Colgate logged Q4 loss due to skin health charges.

news.title:
Colgate-Palmolive reported Q4 2025 sales of $5,230M but a net loss of $37M, reversing prior year's profit.
Despite the loss, 2026 guidance projects modest sales growth, margin expansion, and double-digit EPS growth.
news.summary:
Colgate-Palmolive reported Q4 2025 sales of $5,230M but a net loss of $37M, reversing prior year's profit.
Despite the loss, 2026 guidance projects modest sales growth, margin expansion, and double-digit EPS growth.

news.title: ICICI Securities issues a Sell report on Colgate-Palmoliv with CMP at 2113.6 as of Jan 30.
news.summary: ICICI Securities issues a Sell report on Colgate-Palmoliv with CMP at 2113.6 as of Jan 30.

news.title: Citi reaffirms 'Sell' on Colgate, reducing target price to Rs 2000.
news.summary: Citi reaffirms 'Sell' on Colgate, reducing target price to Rs 2000.

news.title:
Colgate Palmolive India's Q3 FY26 net sales rose 1.4% YoY to Rs. 1,473 Cr.
Net profit grew 2.3%, with Rs. 8.39 Cr exceptional item due to labor code changes.
news.summary:
Colgate Palmolive India's Q3 FY26 net sales rose 1.4% YoY to Rs. 1,473 Cr.
Net profit grew 2.3%, with Rs. 8.39 Cr exceptional item due to labor code changes.

news.title:
Analysts maintain 'Sell' on Colgate-Palmolive India post muted Q3FY26 performance.
Emkay Global and ICICI Securities cite volume pressures, structural challenges, and weak demand recovery.
news.summary:
Analysts maintain 'Sell' on Colgate-Palmolive India post muted Q3FY26 performance.
Emkay Global and ICICI Securities cite volume pressures, structural challenges, and weak demand recovery.

news.title:
Colgate Palmolive (India) Ltd's board meeting on Jan 29, 2026, to approve Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window closed from Dec 29, 2025, to 48 hours post-result disclosure.
news.summary:
Colgate Palmolive (India) Ltd's board meeting on Jan 29, 2026, to approve Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window closed from Dec 29, 2025, to 48 hours post-result disclosure.

news.title: Colgate shares witness a sharp rise, gaining 3%.
news.summary: Colgate shares witness a sharp rise, gaining 3%.

news.title:
Colgate-Palmolive's Dividend King status and upcoming Q4 earnings boost its defensive edge, focusing on innovation and emerging markets.
The company projects $22.4B revenue and $3.5B earnings by 2028, requiring 3.8% yearly growth amid market caution.
news.summary:
Colgate-Palmolive's Dividend King status and upcoming Q4 earnings boost its defensive edge, focusing on innovation and emerging markets.
The company projects $22.4B revenue and $3.5B earnings by 2028, requiring 3.8% yearly growth amid market caution.

news.title:
Colgate Palmolive witnessed an NSE block trade of ~105,923 shares worth Rs. 22.2 Cr.
The trading price for Colgate Palmolive shares was Rs. 2096.1 each.
news.summary:
Colgate Palmolive witnessed an NSE block trade of ~105,923 shares worth Rs. 22.2 Cr.
The trading price for Colgate Palmolive shares was Rs. 2096.1 each.

news.title:
Colgate-Palmolive declared a $0.52/share quarterly dividend amid rising raw material costs and tariff headwinds.
The company focuses on its 2030 Strategy, AI investments, and efficiency to counter margin pressures and drive growth.
news.summary:
Colgate-Palmolive declared a $0.52/share quarterly dividend amid rising raw material costs and tariff headwinds.
The company focuses on its 2030 Strategy, AI investments, and efficiency to counter margin pressures and drive growth.

news.title:
Colgate-Palmolive declares a $0.52/share quarterly dividend payable February 13, 2026, with a record date of January 21, 2026.
The company, operating in over 200 countries, focuses on oral care, sustainability, and community wellbeing.
news.summary:
Colgate-Palmolive declares a $0.52/share quarterly dividend payable February 13, 2026, with a record date of January 21, 2026.
The company, operating in over 200 countries, focuses on oral care, sustainability, and community wellbeing.

news.title:
Nomura projects Q3FY26 margin improvement for Indian consumer firms due to lower input costs.
Strong execution by sector leaders like HUL, Britannia, and Marico supports this trend.
news.summary:
Nomura projects Q3FY26 margin improvement for Indian consumer firms due to lower input costs.
